title: Thai Bao Cream Puffs
description: Crispy bao pastry filled with sweet and creamy filling, inspired by Thai flavors.

ingredients.name: sweet cream
ingredients.notes: heavy cream and a bit of sugar

instructions: Cut bao into small cubes and bake in oven for 5-7 minutes, until lightly toasted.
In a separate bowl, mix crushed biscuits and sugar.
Prepare the cream by whipping heavy cream with a bit of sugar.
Fill the toasted bao cubes with the sweet cream.
Dip the filled bao cubes in the biscuit mixture to coat.
Place the coated bao cubes on a baking sheet and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Garnish with crushed Oreo cookies before serving.
